creator: freebsd@darkain.com
text:
OS installed from the 2020-08-27 snapshot ISO:
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r364846: Thu Aug 27 05:10:55 UTC 2020

I'm getting "nvme0: Missing interrupt" but only on reboot. On a fresh boot (from full power off state), everything loads as expected. After the OS boots, issue the "reboot" command, and upon this next boot, the error shows up.

Fresh boot:
https://dmesgd.nycbug.org/index.cgi?do=view&id=5647

After reboot:
https://dmesgd.nycbug.org/index.cgi?do=view&id=5648
